name: Pepper Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef, stewing, lean, cut into bite size pieces
2 Green chilies, seeded and finely chopped
4 Potatoes, new red, washed and cut into bite size pieces (leave skin on)
3 Thyme, fresh sprigs or 1 tbsp Dried thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Put meat, water, peppers, onion, potatoes, tomatoes, tomato paste, thyme, and salt and pepper to taste in saucepan with cover or Dutch oven.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat and mix well.
3. Cover and cook for 1 hour or until meat is very tender.
To serve:
4. Put cooked rice into the bowls and cover with soup.
